name: deep-search
description: Performs iterative web research using multiple search engines and LLM reasoning/synthesis to answer a query.

query.description: The user's search query or topic.

reasoningModelName.description: Name/ID of the model for iterative reasoning and query generation. If not provided or empty, the system's active local model will be used as a fallback.

search_providers.description: Search providers to use (e.g., Google Search, Bing, Brave, OpenAlex, Wikipedia, DuckDuckGo). Leave empty to use default (DuckDuckGo + OpenAlex).

fileIds.description: Optional array of file IDs to include as context.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of research iterations (search -> reason -> new query).
